Document:
# Rule B3: SSD Characters
Characters where the player has disconnected are considered to be SSD, and there should be a culture of respect around taking care of SSD characters and not taking from them.
- Do not strip, steal from or take from SSD players, leave them alone and only take things off them as necessary to heal them if you have to. Then return said items. - Do not take anything from their ship, for any reason what-so-ever. This includes Contraband / Bounties that you may see that they have. You can remember they have it, but you do not touch or take it. - You may move their ship if it is currently docked to a station, and perform small fixes on their ship to assist the SSD person in staying alive if required. - Do not perform ANY activity with an SSD character that can in any way be perceived as erotic or sexual.
